title: SCP-APD-002
subtitle: ████████████
author: O5-█
summary: Access denied at your current clearance. This entry cannot be overridden.
body:
**Item #:** APD-002

**Object Class:** Keter

### Special Containment Procedures

SCP-APD-002 is held in an air-gapped server enclosure in the APD-14 sub-level systems core, physically isolated from any network capable of external connection. ████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████. Personnel assigned to monitoring duty may not serve more than four consecutive hours per rotation and must undergo a full memetic screening before and after each shift.

Under no circumstances is SCP-APD-002 to be connected, even temporarily, to any system that has ever touched the Foundation's or APD's shared archival network.

### Description

SCP-APD-002 presents as a corrupted data structure of unknown origin and indeterminate size, first detected in January 2026 when it began overwriting adjacent records in an APD-14 test archive during a routine migration. SCP-APD-002 does not require active retrieval to spread: any system that reads it, in full or in part, begins exhibiting the same corruption within an average of eleven hours. No recovery method attempted to date has succeeded; affected systems are destroyed rather than sanitized.

Personnel who directly view SCP-APD-002's content, rather than its effects on a host system, report the sensation of remembering something that never happened to them, in increasing detail with prolonged exposure. █████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████████.

### Addendum APD-002-1: Recovery

SCP-APD-002 was recovered by an APD Splinter unit after automated monitoring software flagged unexplained corruption spreading through a mirrored backup of Site-19's own archival systems, three relay hops removed from any Foundation-facing network. How it reached that mirror remains under investigation. It is the only Keter-class item ever assigned the SCP-APD- prefix.

### Addendum APD-002-2: Designation Review

Unlike SCP-APD-001, SCP-APD-002's renumbering review has been deferred indefinitely. Given its classification and active containment requirements, Internal Security has determined that reassigning or transferring its file carries more operational risk than any benefit gained from standardizing its designation. It remains SCP-APD-002 for the foreseeable future.
